title: Jayakrishna Konda - Professional Profile
content:
Jayakrishna Konda is a Data Scientist, ML Engineer, and GenAI Engineer with 4+ years of experience building production ML systems.

Professional Background:
- Currently working as Data Scientist at Enigma Technologies (GenAI & ML role)
- Previously ML Programming Intern at R/SEEK — UMBC
- Machine Learning Engineer at Cognizant (Jan 2020 – Jul 2023)
- Software Engineering Intern at Infosys
- Master's in Data Science from UMBC (GPA: 3.91/4.0)
- Builder and operator of "Batcave" — a 56-container hybrid-cloud AI platform

Core Competencies:
- GenAI/LLM: RAG pipelines, LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Ollama, Fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA)
- ML/AI: PyTorch, TensorFlow, NLP, Computer Vision (YOLOv8), Edge AI (TensorFlow Lite, ESP32)
- Data Engineering: PySpark, Apache Spark, ETL Pipelines, Feature Engineering
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Redis, SQLite, FAISS
- MLOps: MLflow, Weights & Biases, CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Jenkins), Model Versioning
- Infrastructure: Docker (56 containers), Kubernetes, AWS (SageMaker, Lambda, S3), Oracle Cloud
- Security: Authentik SSO/2FA, Tailscale VPN, Zero-trust architecture, CWE/CVE scanning
- Monitoring: Netdata, Telegram alerting
- Full-stack: Next.js, TypeScript, FastAPI, Node.js, React

Notable Achievements:
- Deployed 56-container "Batcave" AI infrastructure with 99.9% uptime
- Reduced ML inference latency from 450ms to under 90ms
- Processed 10,000+ audio files with 95% deduplication accuracy
- Built RAG-powered systems with 98% OCR accuracy
- Automated security audit identifying 27 vulnerability exposures
- Reduced manual review effort by 30-35% through ML automation
